base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bubble_man — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Bubble Man — underwater boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bubble Man — underwater boss; Bubble Lead gravity-hugging weapon
